mapper.sql: SELECT a.sess_log_sn, a.lgn_se_cd , a.srvc_user_id , a.rqstr_ip_addr, a.cntn_se_no, a.cntn_ocrn_dt, a.cntn_dtl_expln, a.cert_token_vl, a.token_crt_hr , a.sess_expry_prnmnt_hr, a.lgt_dt, a.reg_dt , a.rgtr_id , a.mdfcn_dt , a.mdfr_id FROM kids_own.tb_ca_l_sesn_log_info_mng a WHERE 1=1 ORDER BY a.acsr_id DESC
